query:
-- MC - SmileTel Lite User License: Common Phone MC variant → Buy $3.90, Sell $6.50
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=3.90, defaultRetailPrice=6.50, rrp=6.50,
  notes='Common Phone MC variant: Buy $3.90, Sell $6.50 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=31;

-- SmileTel Lite user: UCXcel Lite → Buy $6.00, Sell $10.00 (not $12)
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=6.00, defaultRetailPrice=10.00, rrp=10.00,
  notes='UCXcel Lite / SmileTel Lite User: Buy $6.00, Sell $10.00 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=26;

-- MC - SmileTel Premium User License: Premium Enterprise PAYG → Buy $19.34, Sell $28.00
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=19.34, defaultRetailPrice=28.00, rrp=28.00,
  notes='Premium Enterprise User PAYG: Buy $19.34, Sell $28.00 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=32;

-- SmileTel Professional User License: Executive User - Included Calls → Buy $18.00, Sell $30.00
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=18.00, defaultRetailPrice=30.00, rrp=30.00,
  notes='Executive User - Included Calls: Buy $18.00, Sell $30.00 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=28;

-- Business Trunk (PAYG): SIP Trunk → Buy $2.00, Sell $9.00
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=2.00, defaultRetailPrice=9.00, rrp=9.00,
  notes='SIP Trunk PAYG: Buy $2.00, Sell $9.00 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=72;

-- SmileTel Essential user: UCXcel Essential → Buy $9.00, Sell $15.00 (not $17)
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET wholesaleCost=9.00, defaultRetailPrice=15.00, rrp=15.00,
  notes='UCXcel Essential: Buy $9.00, Sell $15.00 (Access4 pricebook)'
WHERE id=23;

-- SmileTel Lite User License (Common Phone, no MC): Buy $3.90, Sell $9.00
-- Check if this exists as a separate entry
SELECT id, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice FROM supplier_product_cost_map
WHERE productName IN ('SmileTel Lite User License', 'Virtual Park User', 'Voicemail User')
AND supplier='SasBoss';
